channel.title: South Africa Brief on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in South Africa Brief on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Cape Chronicles: A Franschhoek Weekend — A Winelands Primer for the Curious Traveler
item.description: There is a particular hour on a Friday afternoon in Cape Town when the city exhales. The business-district meetings are over. The last of the week’s small emergencies have been handled. The traffic along the M3 begins to move with purpose rather than friction, because the drivers are all going to the same place, which is: away. Specifically, forty-five minutes away, over the Du Toitskloof mountains into the Berg River valley, to the town of Franschhoek.
